subcodes.first_line: This is a remembrance from Our presence unto a servant among the servants of God, that he may rejoice within his soul and stand firm in love. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا عبد من عباد الله لیستبشر فی نفسه و یکون علی الحب مستقیما طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @personal instructions, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
